mapper.update: /* sample-master-owner-sql-oracle.xml updateCenterList */ UPDATE TORDER_MST_OW A SET ( OWNM , REGNO , BIZTYPE , BIZCTG , CITY , STATE , TEL1 , TEL2 , FAX , CONTACT , CEO , CNTRYCD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , ZIPCD , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT B.OWNM , B.REGNO , B.BIZTYPE , B.BIZCTG , B.CITY , B.STATE , B.TEL1 , B.TEL2 , B.FAX , B.CONTACT , B.CEO , B.CNTRYCD , B.ADDR1 , B.ADDR2 , B.ZIPCD , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_OW B WHERE A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.INTERFACEKEY = #{interfaceId} ) WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_OW C WHERE A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND C.INTERFACEKEY = #{interfaceId} )
mapper.insert: /* sample-master-owner-sql-oracle.xml insertOwnerList */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_OW ( OWKEY , OWNM , REGNO , BIZTYPE , BIZCTG , CITY , STATE , TEL1 , TEL2 , FAX , CONTACT , CEO , CNTRYCD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , ZIPCD , DELYN , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT B.OWKEY , B.OWNM , B.REGNO , B.BIZTYPE , B.BIZCTG , B.CITY , B.STATE , B.TEL1 , B.TEL2 , B.FAX , B.CONTACT , B.CEO , B.CNTRYCD , B.ADDR1 , B.ADDR2 , B.ZIPCD , 'N' , B.CLOSDATE , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_OW B LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_OW A ON B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY WHERE B.INTERFACEKEY = #{interfaceId} AND A.OWKEY IS NULL
